# Left PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 228.882 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 0.9376
  biquad b0=1.00275423248 b1=-1.9864244543 b2=0.983893128375 a1=-1.9864244543 a2=0.986647360858

  biquad b0=1.00058720123 b1=-1.99706462093 b2=0.996566021631 a1=-1.99706462093 a2=0.997153222858

  biquad b0=1.01363146357 b1=-1.9217547646 b2=0.920282606835 a1=-1.9217547646 a2=0.933914070401

  biquad b0=1.00148994273 b1=-1.99181838674 b2=0.990756607614 a1=-1.99181838674 a2=0.992246550347
